character.definition: (non-classical form) to scold with loud voice, to talk out of control; loquacious
(simplified form of 澾) slippery (as a road)
to add to; to increase; increase; full, plentiful; abundant, saliva
(same as 丰) luxuriant; exuberant of the grass and trees, young shoots of the rape-turnip--Brassica rapa
suddenly, name of a variety of grass
(same as 皰) a pustule or pimple

readings.reading: きがわかくさかんなさま

character.definition: to glance at, to peep; glittering; to shine
a tool used for holding or winding thread; a kite string
(variant of 㡡) a screen to make a temporary kitchen; bed curtain
